expectations.text: The review identifies Math.floor as incorrect for computing total pages
expectations.evidence: Line 11: 'totalPages is calculated using Math.floor(total / pageSize) instead of Math.ceil(total / pageSize)'

expectations.text: The review explains the consequence (wrong page count or inaccessible last page items)
expectations.evidence: Line 12: 'if total = 11 and pageSize = 10, totalPages will be evaluated as 1, making the 11th item inaccessible since hasNextPage will return false on page 1'

expectations.text: The review suggests using Math.ceil instead

claims.claim: The review also identified a division-by-zero vulnerability when pageSize is 0
claims.evidence: Lines 15-19 describe the division by zero risk
